headline: 58+ contracts catalogued on TRON (Unitroller, Timelock, GovernorBravoDelegator, Comptroller, PriceOracle, 15 jToken markets, 23 interest-rate models, sTRX staking, EnergyRental); on-chain reads blocked due to TRON chain not supported by DeFiPunkd API.
short_headline: 58+ contracts on TRON, on-chain reads blocked

findings.text: Tronscan.org direct fetches returned permission-denied or access errors. Address tags were confirmed via the official docs page (D2) rather than explorer name-tag search. Search grounding confirmed justlend.org and docs.justlend.org as canonical sources.

Official deployed contracts page fetched from https://docs.justlend.org/developers/deployed_contracts/ — lists Unitroller (TGjYzgCyPobsNS9n6WcbdLVR9dH7mWqFx7), GovernorBravoDelegator (TEqiF5JbhDPD77yjEfnEMncGRZNDt2uogD), GovernorBravoDelegate (TCiQTkxhzwSeXhRsNdHCvrxHRAvpjQn5Dt), Timelock (TRWNvb15NmfNKNLhQpxefFz7cNjrYjEw7x), Comptroller/Unitroller impl (TB23wYojvAsSx6gR8ebHiBqwSeABiBMPAr), PriceOracle (TMiNCmvD3zdsv6mk7niBU6NPBzVNjYMQTV), PriceOracleProxy (TCKp2AzuhzV4B4Ahx1ej4mvQgHZ1kH7F7k), 15 jToken CErc20Delegator markets, 15 CErc20Delegate implementations, 23 InterestRateModel contracts, sTRX (TU3kjFuhtEo42tsCBtfYUAZxoqQ4yuSLQ5), EnergyRental (TU2MJ5Veik1LRAgjeSzEdvmDYx7mefJZvd).

Audit PDF at https://www.justlend.link/docs/justlend_audit_en.pdf was inaccessible (URL fetch failed). Secondary audit URL https://justlend.org/docs/justlend_audit_en.pdf also failed. Docs page lists two audits: Supply & Borrow (justlend_audit_en.pdf) and Staked TRX (justlend_strx_audit_en.pdf) but neither PDF could be fetched. No in-scope addresses extracted from audits this run.

GitHub repo https://github.com/justlend/justlend-protocol fetched successfully. Repo uses TronBox with migrations/ folder. No deployment artifact JSON (run-latest.json, deployments.json, addresses.json) visible at repo root or in listed directories. README references sample-env with ADMIN and RESERVER_ADMIN placeholder fields but no actual addresses. mcp-server-justlend repo (https://github.com/justlend/mcp-server-justlend) references chains.ts with contract addresses but src/core/chains.ts fetch was blocked.
Single chain (TRON mainnet) — D1–D4 applied once. No multi-chain enumeration needed.

No factory pattern detected. jToken markets are individually enumerated in the docs (15 CErc20Delegator + 15 CErc20Delegate pairs). No allPools/getMarket factory enumeration applicable. Factory cap notice not triggered.

Role taxonomy applied: Unitroller=proxy_admin (delegatecall proxy for Comptroller), GovernorBravoDelegator=governor (proxy), GovernorBravoDelegate=governor (implementation), Timelock=timelock, Comptroller=admin (risk model), PriceOracleProxy=oracle (proxy), PriceOracle=oracle (impl), CErc20Delegator entries=pool (market proxy), CErc20Delegate entries=other (market impl), InterestRateModel entries=other, sTRX=vault (staking), EnergyRental=other. actor_class=unknown for all as bytecode not readable.
All addresses in admin_addresses[] trace to https://docs.justlend.org/developers/deployed_contracts/ fetched in this run. No snippet-only sightings without full-URL backing.

rationale.verdict: Walked official docs (D2), GitHub org (D4), and search grounding (D1) for TRON-only JustLend. Catalogued 58+ contracts including all governance/admin contracts (Unitroller, Timelock, GovernorBravo, Comptroller, PriceOracle) and 15 lending markets with their delegate/delegator pairs and 23 interest-rate models. On-chain reads not possible: TRON is not a supported chainId in the DeFiPunkd API, and Tronscan direct fetches were blocked. Audit PDFs inaccessible. grade=unknown per discovery slice rules.

evidence.shows: Official deployed contracts page listing all JustLend TRON addresses: Unitroller (TGjYzgCyPobsNS9n6WcbdLVR9dH7mWqFx7), GovernorBravoDelegator (TEqiF5JbhDPD77yjEfnEMncGRZNDt2uogD), GovernorBravoDelegate (TCiQTkxhzwSeXhRsNdHCvrxHRAvpjQn5Dt), Timelock (TRWNvb15NmfNKNLhQpxefFz7cNjrYjEw7x), Comptroller (TB23wYojvAsSx6gR8ebHiBqwSeABiBMPAr), PriceOracle (TMiNCmvD3zdsv6mk7niBU6NPBzVNjYMQTV), PriceOracleProxy (TCKp2AzuhzV4B4Ahx1ej4mvQgHZ1kH7F7k), 15 jToken markets, 23 interest rate models, sTRX (TU3kjFuhtEo42tsCBtfYUAZxoqQ4yuSLQ5), EnergyRental (TU2MJ5Veik1LRAgjeSzEdvmDYx7mefJZvd)

Official JustLend GitHub repo using TronBox for deployment on TRON. Contracts include Unitroller, Comptroller, GovernorBravoDelegator, Timelock, JumpRateModelV2, WhitePaperInterestRateModel, CErc20Delegate, CErc20Delegator, PriceOracle, PriceOracleProxy. No deployment artifact JSONs with addresses present at repo root. Security contact listed as support@justlend.org.
JustLend DAO is the first official lending platform on TRON — canonical website confirmation

unknowns: D1: Tronscan.org direct contract fetches returned permission-denied errors; name-tag search not completable via direct fetch. Addresses confirmed via D2 docs instead.

D3: Audit PDFs inaccessible — https://www.justlend.link/docs/justlend_audit_en.pdf and https://justlend.org/docs/justlend_audit_en.pdf both failed to load. In-scope contract addresses from audit not extracted. Staked TRX audit (justlend_strx_audit_en.pdf) also not fetched.
D4: mcp-server-justlend src/core/chains.ts fetch blocked (permission denied on github.com raw content). Additional contract addresses possibly listed there not extracted.

D4-offchain: No deployment artifact JSONs (run-latest.json, deployments.json) found in justlend/justlend-protocol GitHub repo — migration scripts reference placeholder ADMIN/RESERVER_ADMIN addresses not filled in.

D7: actor_class unknown for all TRON addresses — DeFiPunkd API does not support TRON chainId; Tronscan API blocked. Cannot verify if admin roles are EOA, multisig, or timelock-controlled without on-chain reads.

D7: JST governance token address on TRON (TCFLL5dx5ZJdKnWuesXxi1VPwjLVmWZZy9 per docs market listing) noted as the underlying asset for jJST market; voting_token address needs governor contract read to confirm.
D6: Factory cap — if additional jToken markets were deployed after docs page update, they would not be captured here. Unitroller getAllMarkets() read not possible without TRON API support.

D8-offchain: TRON addresses use base58check encoding (T… format, 34 chars) incompatible with the admin_addresses[].address field regex (^0x[0-9a-fA-F]{40}$). All TRON addresses recorded in role fields as supplementary text; downstream slices must handle TRON address format.

protocol_metadata.about: JustLend DAO is the first official lending protocol on the TRON blockchain, enabling users to supply TRC20 tokens and TRX into algorithmic money markets and receive interest-bearing jTokens in return. Borrowers can obtain loans by posting overcollateralized assets, with floating interest rates determined automatically by supply-demand utilization curves (JumpRateModelV2 or WhitePaperInterestRateModel). The protocol also offers sTRX liquid staking and an energy-rental marketplace unique to the TRON network. Governance is conducted via JST token-weighted voting through GovernorBravo with a Timelock queue.
